text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I get a summons from Sweep Tosho. I go
where she tells me, and...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Familiar! Now "Magical Girl ☆
Sweepy 5" can begin!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm Magical Black!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You see, recently we've been studying
magic and looking into some rumors around it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Magical Dia here! ♪ What jinx are we unmasking
today?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh, how very exciting. What kind of
experimental drin—I mean... What kind of magic
potion can Professor Tachyon provide to assist
you today?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's why you're here, Familiar! It's part of our
research!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's quite an... eccentric group. Partially just to
keep an eye on things, I decide to accompany
them.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, a bird that can grant wishes has been
spotted around here.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hold on, Magical Dia! That snake is after the
bird!
choice_data_list: It's not safe to rush into thi—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Snake nex ornithogalum... Hear my words, snake!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Get away from there, now! We have business with
that bird!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Heh, there it goes. I'm glad that snake was such
a good listener!
choice_data_list: (I think she just startled it when she yelled...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Look at that cool demeanor! As expected from
the genius Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Next, it's time for potion research! We're making
a potion that'll make us run faster!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We need to gather honey from the
hardest-working bee in its hive and a fang from a
wolf without a pack.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That won't do. Don't go getting weak-kneed now!
Sacrifices must be made in pursuit of great
results! Now then, let's get to looking for that
beehi—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hooold it! You know you can't race if you get
stung and come down with a fever, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't confuse recklessness with courage! Every
witch knows that! We need to come up with a
plan before we do anything.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
How about this? We put the bees to sleep and
mark their backs! We can use those marks to
figure out which one works the hardest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... That's a pretty sound idea. Why don't I
bring something along to put the bees to sleep?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after, the Sweepy 5 continue with their
magical endeavors...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, how about we stop here for today? Sweepy
5, dismissed!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whew! That was so much fun! Thanks, Sweep!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You can thank me by working hard! You
could do with some study too, famil—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey! What are you staring at me for?!
choice_data_list: I was thinking you're a good leader.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was nervous at first about joining the magical
investigation, but Sweep Tosho took the initiative
and watched over her friends. I tell her so, and...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's the big deal? That's what you're
supposed to do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm the best witch at this school. It's only natural
for the strongest witch to take the lead!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I may still be inexperienced, but Grandma raised
me well!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
She protected me when I was in trouble and gave
me advice about being a witch.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And now it's my turn to bring up this new batch of
witches!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's a first-class witch's job. Get it?
choice_data_list: What a great way to think of it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, she's such a cool leader! Don't you just
want to follow her wherever she goes?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You can feel her determination as a leader...
There's a lot that I'd like to learn from her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. Then, things should remain interesting.
I'd like to keep obser—ahem! I mean, may I join
you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! If you're all gonna beg me, then I guess I'll
keep looking after you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may seem childish, but she makes cool,
rational decisions and shows concern for her
friends. Seeing that side of her, I think...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may seem childish, but she makes cool,
rational decisions and shows concern for her
friends. Seeing that side of her, I think...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A what?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I get it! You're cool and dependable... kind of like
a queenpin!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! Call me a great and powerful witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Criminals and witches are totally different!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, no kidding! Who do you think you're
talking to?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You really do think about us so much, Sweep.
Don't you think it's nice your trainer realizes it
too? ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hm, well... I guess you could say it's a good
opportunity to see how much of a genius I am!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Got that? As the familiar of a genius magical girl,
you need to keep your mind sharp too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she says that, she strides off. She may
still have some room to grow, but I'm glad to see
that she cares so deeply for her friends.
